{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/raw_silver.png
|block_health=35
|block_resistance=2
|rotation=ore
|ore_range= Below -250
}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
Silver ore and coal can be crafted into [[Silver Ingot|silver ingots]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Ores]]
